title: Korok Seeds
description: Ever wanted to search for Korok Seeds from BOTW/TOTK? Me neither..
body:
Ever heard of Koroks from The Legend of Zelda? And how you can find 1000 in both Tears of the Kingdom and Breath of the Wild? Now you can in minecraft!


Credits:
- yoon-hamburger
- ayydxn

Features:
- Collecting 1000 koroks for Hestu's Gift!
- Nintendo Switch Shirt! (found in dungeons & end stronghold)
- Korok mask! (found in dungeons & end stronghold)

Koroks can spawn in:

- Flower Forests
- Old Growth Pine Taigas
- Old Growth Spruce Taigas
- Old Growth Birch Forests
- Dark Forests
- Bamboom Jungles
- Mangrove Swamps


P.S Want to make it even more like BOTW/TOTK?
- Check out Towers of the Wild! [https://modrinth.com/mod/totw-modded](https://modrinth.com/mod/totw-modded)

And

- Paragliders! [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders)
